items.titolo: I let Gemini Flows organize my Gmail, and it effectively filtered my inbox (with one sneaky catch)
items.descrizione: Gmail's genius Gemini Flows feature fixes filters - but there's a monthly limit that you should also know about.

items.titolo: Anthropic claims that China's Alibaba used 25,000 fake accounts and 28.8 million exchanges to illicitly 'distill' its Claude model — violations occurred from April to June 2026
items.descrizione: AI tech giant Alibaba, often considered as the Amazon of China, is being accused by Anthropic for using Claude to train its AI models. The American AI startup claimed that it traced over 25,000 accounts to operators that
